Main topics: Statement on the anniversary of the earthquake disaster that occurred on February 6, 2023, centered in Kahramanmaraş and affected 11 provinces, in accordance with the decision taken at the 56th Meeting of the General Assembly dated 4/2/2026; Statement of Çankırı Deputy Muhammet Emin Akbaşoğlu regarding some of his statements in his speech on behalf of the AK Party Group on the anniversary of the earthquake disaster that occurred on February 6, 2023, centered in Kahramanmaraş and affected 11 provinces.; Statement on the 3rd anniversary of the February 6 earthquakes; In accordance with the decision taken at the 56th Meeting of the General Assembly dated 4/2/2026, statement on behalf of İYİ Party Group on the anniversary of the earthquake disaster that occurred on February 6, 2023, centered in Kahramanmaraş and affected 11 provinces..

sessions.summary: TBMM General Assembly sitting 48 in legislative year 4. TOR Phi grouped 107 speech rows from 82 members. Main topics: The Presidency, the necessity, scope and time of which will be appreciated and determined by the President, is to assign the naval elements of the Turkish Armed Forces, outside the territorial waters of the countries in the region, in the Gulf of Aden, off the coast of Somalia, in the Arabian Sea and adjacent regions, to combat piracy, armed robbery and terrorism at sea, and to make the necessary arrangements in accordance with the principles to be determined by the President, in accordance with Article 92 of the Constitution, lastly dated 4/2/2025 and numbered 1440. On the occasion of the authorization (3/1309) to extend the duration of the permission granted by the Decision for one year, starting from 10/2/2026; His statement regarding the attempt to lower the Turkish Flag at the Mardin Nusaybin border; On the occasion of the NEW ROAD Group proposal; On the occasion of the DEM PARTY Group proposal.

sessions.title: TBMM sitting 40: The Presidency's responsibility is to take all necessary measures within the framework of international law against all kinds of threats and security risks to Turkey's national interests, to eliminate attacks that may be directed at Turkey's interests in Libya by illegitimate armed groups and terrorist organizations in Libya, to ensure the maintenance of our national security against other possible risks such as mass migration, to deliver the humanitarian aid needed by the Libyan people, to eliminate the activities of DAESH, Al Qaeda and other terrorist organizations that threaten the integrity and stability of Libya. to eliminate illegal armed groups and actions that create a suitable environment for illegal migration and human trafficking, to use the authority given to member states by the UN Security Council Resolution 2292 (2016) to supervise the arms embargo on Libya on the high seas, if necessary, to comply with the demands of the then Libyan Government of National Accord and the subsequently established National Unity Government.
sessions.originalTitle: Cumhurbaşkanlığının, Türkiye’nin millî çıkarlarına yönelik her türlü tehdit ve güvenlik riskine karşı uluslararası hukuk çerçevesinde gerekli her türlü tedbiri almak, Libya’daki gayrimeşru silahlı gruplar ile terör örgütleri tarafından Türkiye’nin Libya’daki menfaatlerine yönelebilecek saldırıları bertaraf etmek, kitlesel göç gibi diğer muhtemel risklere karşı millî güvenliğimizin idame ettirilmesini sağlamak, Libya halkının ihtiyacı olan insani yardımları ulaştırmak, Libya’nın bütünlüğü ve istikrarını tehdit eden DEAŞ, El Kaide ve diğer terör örgütlerinin faaliyetlerini ve yasa dışı silahlı gruplar ile yasa dışı göç ve insan ticareti için uygun ortam oluşturan eylemleri bertaraf etmek, gerektiği takdirde BM Güvenlik Konseyinin 2292 (2016) sayılı Kararı’yla Libya’ya yönelik silah ambargosunun açık denizlerde denetlenmesi yönünde üye devletlere verilen yetkiyi kullanmak, dönemin Libya Ulusal Mutabakat Hükûmeti tarafından talep edilmiş olan ve bilahare kurulan Millî Birlik Hükûmetinin d
sessions.summary: TBMM General Assembly sitting 40 in legislative year 4. TOR Phi grouped 57 speech rows from 49 members. Main topics: On the occasion of the 5th Round Meetings of the 2026 Central Government Budget Law Proposal and the 2024 Central Government Final Account Law Proposal; Minister of Energy and Natural Resources Alparslan Bayraktar's statement regarding some of his statements in his speech in the question-answer part of the fifth round of talks on the 2026 Central Government Budget Law Proposal numbered 226 and the 2024 Central Government Final Account Law Proposal numbered 227; Some of Ankara Deputy Murat Emir's statements in his speech due to taunts and his statement regarding the Ministers whose budgets are being discussed today; Manisa Deputy Bahadır Nahit Yenişehirlioğlu's statement regarding some of his statements in his statement.

sessions.title: TBMM sitting 9: In accordance with the Presidency's Decision No. 2790 (2025) of the United Nations Security Council to extend the term of office of UNIFIL, the Turkish Armed Forces elements, the borders, scope and amount of which will be determined by the President, will continue to serve for another two years as of 31/10/2025, within the scope of the principles determined by the United Nations Security Council Resolution No. 1701 (2006) and the Turkish Grand National Assembly Decision No. 880. On the occasion of the authorization (3/1199) granting permission in accordance with Article 92 of the Constitution to participate in UNIFIL and to make the necessary arrangements regarding this by the President.
sessions.originalTitle: Cumhurbaşkanlığının, Birleşmiş Milletler Güvenlik Konseyinin UNIFIL’in görev süresinin uzatılması yönündeki 2790 (2025) sayılı Kararı uyarınca, hudut, şümul ve miktarı Cumhurbaşkanınca belirlenecek Türk Silahlı Kuvvetleri unsurlarının, 1701 (2006) sayılı Birleşmiş Milletler Güvenlik Konseyi Kararı ve 880 sayılı Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi Kararı’yla tespit edilen ilkeler kapsamında, 31/10/2025 tarihinden itibaren iki yıl daha UNIFIL’e iştirak etmesi ve bununla ilgili gerekli düzenlemelerin Cumhurbaşkanınca yapılması için Anayasa’nın 92’nci maddesi uyarınca izin verilmesine dair tezkeresi (3/1199) münasebetiyle
sessions.summary: TBMM General Assembly sitting 9 in legislative year 4. TOR Phi grouped 77 speech rows from 69 members. Main topics: In accordance with the Presidency's Decision No. 2790 (2025) of the United Nations Security Council to extend the term of office of UNIFIL, the Turkish Armed Forces elements, the borders, scope and amount of which will be determined by the President, will continue to serve for another two years as of 31/10/2025, within the scope of the principles determined by the United Nations Security Council Resolution No. 1701 (2006) and the Turkish Grand National Assembly Decision No. 880. On the occasion of the authorization (3/1199) granting permission in accordance with Article 92 of the Constitution to participate in UNIFIL and to make the necessary arrangements regarding this by the President.; The Presidency's duty is to take all necessary measures within the framework of international law against separatist movements, terrorist threats and all kinds of security risks against Turkey's national security, to eliminate future attacks on our country from all terrorist organizations in Iraq and Syria, and to ensure the maintenance of our national security against other possible risks such as mass migration, to effectively protect Turkey's interests against unjustified separatist attempts in the regions adjacent to Turkey's southern land borders and developments that may be related to them. To protect and guard in a way, to help follow a rapid and dynamic policy in order not to encounter an irreparable situation in the future depending on the course of developments, to send the Turkish Armed Forces to foreign countries to carry out cross-border operations and interventions, if necessary, with borders, extent, amount and time to be appreciated and determined by the President, and; Statement by the Republican People's Party regarding the bill prepared on rare earth elements; Statement regarding the Presidential bills that will be discussed today in the General Assembly.

sourceRows.title: In accordance with the Presidency's Decision No. 2790 (2025) of the United Nations Security Council to extend the term of office of UNIFIL, the Turkish Armed Forces elements, the borders, scope and amount of which will be determined by the President, will continue to serve for another two years as of 31/10/2025, within the scope of the principles determined by the United Nations Security Council Resolution No. 1701 (2006) and the Turkish Grand National Assembly Decision No. 880. On the occasion of the authorization (3/1199) granting permission in accordance with Article 92 of the Constitution to participate in UNIFIL and to make the necessary arrangements regarding this by the President.
sourceRows.originalTitle: Cumhurbaşkanlığının, Birleşmiş Milletler Güvenlik Konseyinin UNIFIL’in görev süresinin uzatılması yönündeki 2790 (2025) sayılı Kararı uyarınca, hudut, şümul ve miktarı Cumhurbaşkanınca belirlenecek Türk Silahlı Kuvvetleri unsurlarının, 1701 (2006) sayılı Birleşmiş Milletler Güvenlik Konseyi Kararı ve 880 sayılı Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi Kararı’yla tespit edilen ilkeler kapsamında, 31/10/2025 tarihinden itibaren iki yıl daha UNIFIL’e iştirak etmesi ve bununla ilgili gerekli düzenlemelerin Cumhurbaşkanınca yapılması için Anayasa’nın 92’nci maddesi uyarınca izin verilmesine dair tezkeresi (3/1199) münasebetiyle

sourceRows.title: The Presidency's duty is to take all necessary measures within the framework of international law against separatist movements, terrorist threats and all kinds of security risks against Turkey's national security, to eliminate future attacks on our country from all terrorist organizations in Iraq and Syria, and to ensure the maintenance of our national security against other possible risks such as mass migration, to effectively protect Turkey's interests against unjustified separatist attempts in the regions adjacent to Turkey's southern land borders and developments that may be related to them. To protect and guard in a way, to help follow a rapid and dynamic policy in order not to encounter an irreparable situation in the future depending on the course of developments, to send the Turkish Armed Forces to foreign countries to carry out cross-border operations and interventions, if necessary, with borders, extent, amount and time to be appreciated and determined by the President, and
sourceRows.originalTitle: Cumhurbaşkanlığının, Türkiye’nin millî güvenliğine yönelik ayrılıkçı hareketler, terör tehdidi ve her türlü güvenlik riskine karşı uluslararası hukuk çerçevesinde gerekli her türlü tedbiri almak, Irak ve Suriye’deki tüm terör örgütlerinden ülkemize bundan sonra da yönelebilecek saldırıları bertaraf etmek ve kitlesel göç gibi diğer muhtemel risklere karşı millî güvenliğimizin idame ettirilmesini sağlamak, Türkiye’nin güney kara sınırlarına mücavir bölgelerde yaşanan ve hiçbir meşruiyeti olmayan tek taraflı bölücü girişimler ve bunlarla ilgili olabilecek gelişmeler karşısında Türkiye’nin menfaatlerini etkili bir şekilde korumak ve kollamak, gelişmelerin seyrine göre ileride telafisi güç bir durumla karşılaşmamak için süratli ve dinamik bir politika izlenmesine yardımcı olmak üzere hudut, şümul, miktar ve zamanı Cumhurbaşkanınca takdir ve tayin olunacak şekilde, Türk Silahlı Kuvvetlerinin gerektiği takdirde sınır ötesi harekât ve müdahalede bulunmak üzere yabancı ülkelere gönderilmesi ve

sourceRows.title: In accordance with the Presidency's Decision No. 2790 (2025) of the United Nations Security Council to extend the term of office of UNIFIL, the Turkish Armed Forces elements, the borders, scope and amount of which will be determined by the President, will continue to serve for another two years as of 31/10/2025, within the scope of the principles determined by the United Nations Security Council Resolution No. 1701 (2006) and the Turkish Grand National Assembly Decision No. 880. On the occasion of the authorization (3/1199) granting permission in accordance with Article 92 of the Constitution to participate in UNIFIL and to make the necessary arrangements regarding this by the President.
